author: FireAndRescueAcademy
description: Button-driven announcement composer that formats admin input into a consistent embed without using AI.
install_msg: Announcer loaded. Configure it with `[p]announcerset channel #channel`, then post the composer button with `[p]announcer button`.
short: Format admin announcement input into a consistent embed.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores guild-level announcement channel, role, color, and footer settings. It does not store announcement content after posting.
